'''''The Empire Strikes Back Annual''''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom that collected the [[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|''Star Wars'' Marvel UK]] series of comic books of the adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. The story was first published in the UK in [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 118|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 118]]-[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 135|''135'']]

A year later, the book was followed up with [[The Empire Strikes Back Annual No. 2|''The Empire Strikes Back Annual'' No. 2]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-star-wars-comic-book-annuals|text=''Star Wars'' in the UK: ''Star Wars'' Comic Book Annuals}}</ref>
